headline: UK Royal Navy Awards Teledyne Contract for Autonomous Underwater Vehicles and Floats
summary: THOUSAND OAKS, Calif., March 31, 2026--Teledyne Marine, part of Teledyne Technologies Incorporated (NYSE:TDY), is pleased to announce that it has been awarded a contract by the UK Ministry of Defence (MOD) in support of the Royal Navy’s Future Maritime Data Gathering (FMDG) - Persistent Oceanographic Data Collect, strengthening the Royal Navy’s oceanographic and environmental data collection capabilities.
